canonical_definition: A tunable benchmark for sequential reasoning in LLMs, featuring synthetic pathfinding tasks with orthogonal control over logical depth, backtracking count, and noise ratio, enabling fine-grained analysis of reasoning failure modes.
papers: Image Difference Captioning via Adversarial Preference Optimization
